faithfulness.assessment: False and non-rumor cases are selected and labeled; full misinformation behavior calibration remains future work.
faithfulness.name: Misinformation modeling

faithfulness.assessment: Phase 6 uses a deterministic Barabasi-Albert directed projection with diagnostics and dashboard snapshots; it is still synthetic, not calibrated to observed follower edges.
faithfulness.name: Social network ABM

faithfulness.assessment: Observed Phi targets, chronological RMSE/NRMSE fitting, and calibrated four-feed case-study comparisons are implemented; final paper-quality plots remain future work.
faithfulness.name: Empirical calibration and validation

faithfulness.assessment: Phase 6 adds Bayesian-style belief updates, background posts, sampled feed sizes, and verified influence; exact equation-level paper parity remains an audit item.
faithfulness.name: Agent belief modeling

faithfulness.assessment: Chronological, popularity-based, belief-based, and random objectives are implemented and compared under calibrated case-study parameters.
faithfulness.name: Newsfeed curation algorithms

known_limitations: Exact paper table targets for Tables 3, 4, and 5 still need transcription.
Observed follower-network edges are unavailable in the local ACL2017 files.
Bayesian update is a paper-aligned approximation pending exact equation-level audit.

phases.description: Parsed paper-relevant ACL2017 cases and ran dependency-light synthetic counterfactual feed simulations.
phases.name: Phase 1: Data-assisted MVP

phases.description: Reconstructed observed event tables and hourly Phi targets from ACL2017 propagation trees.
phases.name: Phase 2: Observed cascades

phases.description: Added explicit simulated event traces, state counts, scalar belief updates, source-post lineage, and popularity feedback.
phases.name: Phase 3: Model fidelity upgrade

phases.description: Fit chronological simulations to observed Phi targets with a small probability grid and reported RMSE/NRMSE.
phases.name: Phase 4: Calibration and validation

phases.description: Ran calibrated chronological, popularity, belief, and random feed comparisons for the paper case studies.
phases.name: Phase 5: Calibrated feed comparison

phases.description: Added paper-probability repair runs, Barabasi-Albert network snapshots, observed cascade snapshots, and target-verdict tracking.
phases.name: Phase 6: Paper-style outputs

project.name: Social Feed ABM Replication
project.status: Phase 6 complete; table transcription still needed

inputs.name: ACL2017 Twitter15 propagation trees
inputs.role: Local-only raw cascade source; ignored by Git

inputs.name: Phase 1 config
inputs.role: Selected cases, paper parameters, and MVP simulation settings

outputs.name: Dashboard data snapshot
outputs.role: Sanitized tracked summary for public progress dashboard
